title: rosa alpina var. rubella
intro: Rosa alpina var. rubella, also known as the alpine rose, is a subspecies of the alpine rose plant, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antimicrobial agent. The herbal preparations of Rosa alpina var. rubella include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically made by steeping the plant's flowers or leaves in hot water or a solvent.
